title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CBRE India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CBRE India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!
